title: acalypha senilis
intro: Acalypha senilis is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the 'white cat's whiskers' due to its white, fluffy inflorescences resembling a cat's whiskers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Acalypha senilis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Acalypha senilis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
